name: chargebee/chargebee-php
description: ChargeBee API client implementation for PHP

suggest.psr/http-client-implementation: Any PSR-18 HTTP client (e.g. symfony/http-client) — in a future major version Guzzle will become optional.
suggest.psr/http-factory-implementation: Any PSR-17 factory (e.g. nyholm/psr7) — required if you inject a PSR-18 client without PSR-17 factories and Guzzle is not installed.
